expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[Width], [Height], [Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan material papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan material papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là Kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Phía sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang sukat ng mga tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa Tuktok, Ibaba, at Gilid na Tabla, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa Background na Tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကျန်မျှောင်းများအတွက် ပရော်ဖိုင်မှန်တည်ရှိ 'Width'[ இல்லை,တစ်​​‌ခြားစာတင်တင်း ဘောင်းလျောက် ပြည်၍မူ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាតួឯកសារសម្រាប់តុបតែង [Width], [Height], និង [Depth] គឺគួរតែមាន។ (AI translated, please check)
